headline: Baron Asset Fund Bets on Vulcan Materials Company’s (VMC) Attractive Long-Term Growth Potential
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q1 2026 investor letter for the “Baron Asset Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. U.S. equity markets started the year on a positive note. In February, market dynamics changed due to concerns about AI disruption, accelerated by U.S. and Israeli military action in […]
